column1: Brendan Donovan leads the charge today with a steady bat in the leadoff spot, boasting a strong 74.4% hit probability and a clear platoon advantage against Ryan Johnson. Trea Turner isn't far behind, also hitting atop the order in a hitter-friendly park, making his reliable profile tough to ignore. Nico Hoerner and Jeremy Pena round out the top options, both flashing top-of-order roles and favorable matchups for those looking to extend their streaks. This slate is loaded with trustworthy bats—Donovan stands out as the safest bet to keep your run alive.
